=== bd1990-09-06_dallas.txt

Bob Dylan, 9/6/90, Dallas, Texas, Fair Park Music Hall, 2CDR

Sourced from LB-4757: (42min+45min), version "a"; Audience recording > Unknown transfer > CDR(x) > EAC (Secure/Offset) > FLAC (Level 8) > HungerCity, From the same master as LB-0126 but this has less hiss and the levels are higher. Very good sound [B+].; bittorrent download 04/07; in comparison to LB-126 this has a lot  less hiss but is harsher but better overall; very good sound [B] but gets to B+ with eq

CD1
41:53, 1 Ol' MacDonald, 2 Silvio, 3 Man In The Long Black Coat, 4 Willing, 5 Masters Of War, 6 I'll Remember You, 7 Man Of Peace, 8 It's Alright, Ma (I'm Only Bleeding), 9 Trail Of The Buffalo, 10 Gates Of Eden, 

CD2
44:35, 11 Mr. Tambourine Man, 12 Rainy Day Women # 12 & 35, 13 Every Grain Of Sand, 14 All Along The Watchtower, 15 What Good Am I?, 16 In The Garden, 17 Like A Rolling Stone, 18 Blowin' In The Wind, 19 Highway 61 Revisited
